title: gonolobus carolinensis
intro: Gonolobus carolinensis, also known as the Carolina milkweed vine or Carolina gourd, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to the southeastern United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gonolobus carolinensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as dried and used in capsule or powder form, making it a versatile and valuable medicinal plant.
